center.name: 小巽他群岛
center.summary: 小巽他群岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联35种鸟类，包括橙脚冢雉、蓝胸鹑、Pink-headed imperial pigeon等35种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Arafura fantail (Rhipidura dryas), sometimes known as the wood fantail, inhabits the Lesser Sunda Islands, the northern coast of Australia from the Kimberley to the western side of the Cape York Peninsula, including subcoastally in the Top End of the Northern Territory, and southern New Guinea

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The ashy-bellied white-eye (Zosterops citrinella) is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae found in the Lesser Sunda Islands in the Indonesian Archipelago and northern Cape York Peninsula in Queensland, Australia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Australasian darter is found in the lowlands of New Guinea, New Britain, the Moluccas and the Lesser Sunda Islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Australian rufous fantail can be found in parts of Australia, southeast Asia, and in the Oceanic regions of Micronesia and Melanesia. They are residents of the Lesser Sunda Islands and the Maluku Islands of Indonesia, southern New Guinea and its associated islands, the Solomon Islands, the Marianas and the Carolinian island of Yap

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The banded fruit dove is native to the Lesser Sunda Islands and ranges from Bali eastward to Timor-Leste

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In Indonesia, it is found in Java, Lesser Sunda Islands and Sulawesi, where it inhabits the lowland and hill forests

birds.evidence: It is found in northern Australia, the Lesser Sunda Islands and southern New Guinea

birds.evidence: It is found in the Lesser Sunda Islands (Sumbawa and Flores)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The bird occurs in south-eastern Borneo, the southern Philippines, Sulawesi, Moluccas, Lesser Sunda Islands, north and south-east New Guinea, New Britain (Lake Lalili), and northern and eastern Australia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Flores flowerpecker (Dicaeum rhodopygiale) is a species of passerine bird in the flowerpecker family Dicaeidae that is found in mountainous regions of the Indonesian island of Flores, one of the Lesser Sunda Islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: An Indonesian endemic, the Flores hawk-eagle is distributed in forests of Flores, Lombok and Sumbawa in the Lesser Sundas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The great-billed parrot is found in forest, woodland and mangrove in the south-east Asian islands of Maluku, Raja Ampat, Talaud, Sangir, Sarangani, the Lesser Sundas, and nearby small islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The iris lorikeet is distributed in the forests and woodlands on the islands of Wetar and Timor in the Lesser Sundas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The pink-headed imperial pigeon (Ducula rosacea) is a species of bird in the family Columbidae found in the Lesser Sunda Islands of Indonesia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the eastern Lesser Sunda Islands and Kai Islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is endemic to Indonesia, where it occurs in the Lesser Sunda Islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: An Indonesian endemic, the Sumba hornbill inhabits semi-evergreen forests of Sumba in the Lesser Sunda Islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is endemic to Sumba in the western Lesser Sunda Islands of Indonesia, where it is found in forest with a significant component of deciduous trees

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to Sumbawa, Alor, Lomblen and Flores islands in the Lesser Sundas

birds.evidence: The yellow-crested cockatoo is found in wooded and cultivated areas of East Timor and Indonesia's islands of Sulawesi and the Lesser Sundas

birds.evidence: It is found in south-eastern Asia, Sumatra, Java and the Lesser Sundas

birds.evidence: It occurs in eastern Java, southern Sulawesi, Bali and on the Lesser Sunda Islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The rose-crowned fruit dove is distributed in lowland rainforests of northern and eastern Australia, and monsoon forests of northern Australia, Lesser Sunda Islands and Maluku Islands of Indonesia

birds.evidence: It is found in a wide range of semi-open habitats in south-east Asia, ranging from Myanmar to the Lesser Sundas and west Philippines

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Endemic to Indonesia, Wallace's fruit dove is found in lowland riverine and coastal forests in the Lesser Sunda Islands, the Moluccas, the Aru Islands, and occasionally in southwestern New Guinea
